name: Martha Washington's Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, water, corn syrup, and salt in a small saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture quickly to a boil, stirring only until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue boiling without stirring until the mixture forms a very soft ball when dipped into cold water (232°F).
4. Allow the mixture to cool to lukewarm (110°F).
5. Melt chocolate in a medium saucepan over boiling water.
6. Add butter and vanilla extract to the melted chocolate.
7. Remove from the heat and gradually add corn syrup, stirring constantly until smooth and thickened.
8. Return to the heat and continue stirring until the frosting is softened and has the right consistency for spreading.
9. Remove from the heat and spread on the cake. If needed, reheat over hot water to keep it soft while spreading.
10. This will make enough frosting to cover the tops and sides of two 7 1/2 x 9-inch layers.
